action.reasoning: Observation: Confirmed best is 391.40 with model_a + model_b ensemble. Have 0.95h remaining and 9 iterations. Analysis: Time is too tight to safely train a new model (~30min) and test it. Best to stop here with confirmed best score. Decision: End experiment.
